scripts.dev: docker compose --file docker-compose.dev.yml up -d db --remove-orphans && pnpm dev:frontend && pnpm dev:backend
scripts.postinstall: pnpm generate && pnpm --filter backend run install
scripts.test:frontend: pnpm --filter frontend test && pnpm --filter frontend e2e
scripts.lint: pnpm prettier:write && pnpm lint:contract && pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm lint:backend && pnpm lint:sql && pnpm lint:docker
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm format && pnpm lint:contract && pnpm lint:frontend:fix && pnpm lint:backend && pnpm lint:sql && pnpm lint:docker
scripts.lint:contract: pnpm --filter contract lint && pnpm --filter contract validate
scripts.lint:frontend: pnpm --filter frontend lint && pnpm --filter frontend typecheck
scripts.lint:frontend:fix: pnpm --filter frontend lint:fix && pnpm --filter frontend typecheck
scripts.docker:lint: docker run --rm -i hadolint/hadolint < frontend/Dockerfile && docker run --rm -i hadolint/hadolint < backend/Dockerfile && docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/work" -w /work bridgecrew/checkov:3.2.469 -f frontend/Dockerfile -f backend/Dockerfile --quiet
scripts.bruno:test: start-server-and-test "cd backend && mvn --no-transfer-progress spring-boot:run" http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/admin/health "cd bruno && pnpm exec bru run --env ci"
scripts.ci: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm ci:e2e
scripts.ci:e2e: docker compose up db -d --wait && pnpm test:e2e; ci_exit=$?; docker compose down; exit $ci_exit
